name: Nightly

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 2 * * *"     # 02:00 UTC
  workflow_dispatch: {}      # every scheduled job is manually invokable

permissions:
  id-token: write
  contents: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  deep-tests:
    name: Mutation · full integration
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v3
      - run: uv sync --locked
      - run: just test-int
      - run: just mutation          # mutmut on compliance/engine + policies

  security:
    name: DAST · CodeQL · dependency audit
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with: { languages: python, javascript }
      - uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
      - name: ZAP baseline vs staging
        run: just dast env=staging
      - run: just dep-audit         # trivy + licence allow-list; report artifact

  platform-health:
    name: Drift · chain · perf smoke · eval trends
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: azure/login@v2
        with: { client-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_CLIENT_ID_CI }}", tenant-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_TENANT_ID }}", subscription-id: "${{ vars.AZURE_SUBSCRIPTION_ID }}" }
      - run: just tf-drift env=staging && just tf-drift env=prod    # non-empty plan → issue
      - run: just chain-verify env=staging && just chain-verify env=prod
      - run: just perf-smoke env=staging                            # trend gate ±15% vs 7-day median
      - run: just eval-trend-report                                 # dashboard + regression issues
      - run: just flake-report

  issue-on-failure:
    name: Open issue on any nightly failure
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [deep-tests, security, platform-health]
    if: failure()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            await github.rest.issues.create({ ...context.repo,
              title: `Nightly failure — ${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}`,
              labels: ["nightly", "triage"],
              body: `Run: ${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}` });
